zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma Glanville於大約1208年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可巴可頓時，她的父親Geoffrey de Glanville25歲，母親Margaret de La Haye21歲。她和John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1277年5月30日在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma Glanville于大约1208年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可巴可頓时，她的父亲Geoffrey de Glanville25岁，母亲Margaret de La Haye21岁。她和John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1277年5月30日在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Glanville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cornwall and Devon): of Norman origin, a habitational name from a place so called in Calvados, France, named from an ancient Germanic personal name of uncertain form and meaning + Old French ville ‘settlement’. This name has frequently been confused with Glanfield, a habitational name from Glanvill Farm in Devon, Clanville in Somerset and Hampshire, or Clanfield in Hampshire, or from some other place likewise named with Old English clǣne ‘clean’ (i.e. free of brambles and undergrowth) + feld ‘pasture, open country’.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma Glanville was born about 1208, in Bacton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Geoffrey de Glanville, was 25 and her mother, Margaret de La Haye, was 21. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby. She died on 30 May 1277, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma Glanville est née environ 1208, à Bacton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey de Glanville, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret de La Haye, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby. Elle est décédée le 30 mai 1277, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma Glanville um 1208 in Bacton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey de Glanville 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret de La Haye 21. Sie hatte mit John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 30. Mai 1277 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Glanville è nata il circa 1208 nel Bacton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Geoffrey de Glanville, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret de La Haye, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby. Morì il 30 maggio 1277, nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma Glanvilleが約1208年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクバクトンで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Glanvilleは25歳，母Margaret de La Hayeは21歳であった。彼女はJohn De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derbyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1277年5月30日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma Glanville(이)가 대략 1208년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 바크턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Glanville(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de La Haye(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1277년 5월 30일 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Glanville nasceu aproximadamente 1208, em Bacton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey de Glanville, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de La Haye, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby. Ela faleceu em 30 de maio de 1277, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma Glanville родилась около 1208 г. в местности бактон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de Glanville было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de La Haye, 21. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby. Она умерла 30 мая 1277 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma Glanville nació aproximadamente 1208, en Bacton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Geoffrey de Glanville, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret de La Haye, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con John De Grey Sheriff of Nottingham & Derby. Murió el 30 de mayo de 1277, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
